title: The Admiral's List: Karath Home Safely
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Admiral's List: Karath Home Safely''' was the edition of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'' that was included with [[Knights of the Old Republic 22|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 22]].
